title: Mixed Vegetable Salad

ingredients.title: Vegetables
items: 1 medium cucumber, finely chopped or diced
1 medium carrot, grated or finely chopped
1 small raw mango (optional), finely chopped (for tanginess)

ingredients.title: For Dressing & Seasoning
items: 1-2 green chilies, finely chopped (adjust to taste)
1 tablespoon fresh coriander leaves, finely chopped
1/4 teaspoon black salt (kala namak) or regular salt, to taste
Freshly ground black pepper, to taste

instruction.title: Method
steps: Prepare Vegetables: Wash and chop all vegetables as mentioned. Boil the peas and potato if using. Drain and cool them.
Mix Ingredients: In a large mixing bowl, combine cucumber, carrot, tomato, onion, peas, potato, capsicum, and mango (if using).
Add Seasonings: Add finely chopped green chilies, coriander leaves, lemon juice, roasted cumin powder, chaat masala, black salt, and black pepper.
Toss Well: Gently toss the salad until all ingredients are well combined and coated with the spices and lemon juice.
Taste and Adjust: Check seasoning and adjust salt, lemon juice, or chaat masala if needed.
Serve: Serve fresh as a side with Indian meals or as a healthy snack.

chefTips: Use fresh, crisp vegetables for best texture.
Roasting cumin seeds before grinding adds a wonderful aroma.
You can add pomegranate seeds or roasted peanuts for crunch and a burst of flavor.
This salad can be chilled for 15-20 minutes before serving for a refreshing taste.
